# afslug CLI Reference

# afslug - Generate a slug with the default agent-first-slug rules.

```text
Usage: afslug [OPTIONS] <INPUT>

Arguments:
  <INPUT>
          Text to slugify

Options:
      --output <OUTPUT>
          Output format: json, yaml, or plain

          [default: json]

  -V, --version
          Print the CLI version

  -h, --help
          Print help. Add --output json|yaml|markdown to render this help in another format.
```
AFDATA: 0.19.1
